result.markdown:
# Load the rmarkdown package
library(rmarkdown)

# Set the path to your Quarto project directory
quarto_project_path <- "/04_Rrender/Quarto/Guozheng"

# List all .qmd files in the project directory
qmd_files <- list.files(quarto_project_path, pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)

# Loop through the .qmd files and render them
for (qmd_file in qmd_files) {
  render(qmd_file)
}
